Text: Model 1 POWL with Potential Unfairness Structure Start ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck do while style check if incomplete RequestMoreInfo then check again In POWL LOOP A B means execute A then either exit or execute B then A again So A DataCompletenessCheck B RequestMoreInfo Sequence ReceiveApplication to Loop to SkillAssessment to XOR to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision XOR XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck
